data.title: From $0 To $114K In 5 Years: 34-Year-Old Investor Says 'I Buy As Much As I Can Every Month' – Aims To Live Off Dividends, Shares Top 3 Picks
Sandoz Files Lawsuit Alleging Amgen Illegally Blocked Biosimilar Competition For Its Blockbuster Arthritis Drug
data.description: Sandoz sues Amgen in U.S. court over Enbrel patents, alleging efforts to block biosimilar Erelzi and delay competition in the inflammatory disease market.

data.title: ETFs Last Week: Wall Street Whipsaws, Dollar Under Siege, Yet These 5 Funds Won
data.description: Trump's tariffs shook markets and the dollar, but some niche ETFs shined. Rigetti, Broadcom, gold, interest rates and corn ETFs topped last week's gains.

data.title: Dell Technologies Stock Is Rallying Monday: What's Going On?
data.description: Dell Technologies Inc (NYSE:DELL) shares are getting a lift Monday morning following tech tariff exemptions from the Trump administration.

data.title: Synaptics Targets Foldable Boom with New S3930 Series Touch Controllers
data.description: Synaptics (SYNA) shares up premarket after unveiling S3930 touch controllers, designed for foldable OLED displays. Sampling now, mass production in July 2025. Partnerships for ATSC 3.0 and ULP SoCs also announced.
